title: solanum villosum subsp. alatum
intro: Solanum villosum subsp. alatum is a lesser-known species of the Solanum genus, often referred to as the "hairy bittersweet nightshade" or "alate bittersweet nightshade", which is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Solanum villosum subsp. alatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Solanum villosum subsp. alatum is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it has also been used in traditional herbal remedies to make tonics and salves, although it's essential to consult with a medical professional before using any herbal preparations.
